name: Medjay Predasite
description: These hard-charging, four-legged predators make formidable companions when in the field.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Hotfix 29.0.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error that could occur if a wild Medjay Predasite was charging towards you while using Paralytic Spores and died, which could cause other enemies to not be vulnerable to finishers.
